title: Arctic Sea Ice Extent: January 25, 2024
summary: January 25, 2024: The sea ice has continued to increase , and at a greater rate of 1.68% (from last week’s growth rate of 0.81%), from the level on 01/18/2024 of 14.034 M km 2 to 14.274 M km 2 for this week.
